Home / Lore / Missions / Camp White Oak

mission

Camp White Oak

An Episode 1 mission in which Division Agents pursue President Ellis at a Black Tusk position outside Washington.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

The pursuit of Ellis

Camp White Oak follows Tidal Basin and turns the hunt toward President Ellis. The operation fails to secure him when Black Tusk completes an extraction first. [1][2]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    Ubisoft introduced Camp White Oak as one of two Episode 1 missions, accessible after World Tier 5 and completion of Tidal Basin. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Division Agents attempt to capture President Ellis at Camp White Oak, but Black Tusk extracts him before they can reach him. [2]

Related records

  • Black Tuskinvolves
  • Camp White Oaklocated at
  • Tidal Basinfollows

Sources

  1. [1] Intelligence Annex: Manning National Zoo & Camp White Oak — Ubisoft (2019-07-23). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  2. [2] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Later reuse of Camp White Oak in seasonal missions is outside this Episode 1 record.

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
